'''Dace Bonearm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] active in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Dace would frequently associate with the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[IG-72]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Bonearm and IG-72 stole the [[HWK-290 light freighter/Legends|HWK-290 light freighter]] [[Moldy Crow/Legends|''Moldy Crow'']] from [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], using it as a decoy in a ploy to claim the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Winfrid Dagore]], before abandoning the ''Crow'' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teth/Legends|Teth]].<ref name="Dark">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407b|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 2: Unsung Heroes of the Light}}</ref> In 0 BBY, Dace and IG-72 both accepted bounties from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] in his townhouse in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], meeting with him immediately after [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] accepted the bounty on [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>
